content: We can frame Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative improvement as a base framework that can be augmented by the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hierarchical self-improvement pipeline for LLMs. This new pipeline would first generate multiple inconsistent candidate outputs from the LLM’s different solving perspectives, then run iterative self-feedback refinement on each candidate, before selecting the final output, all without extra training data or external supervision.
